metadata.title: Phrase Connectors Learning Data
metadata.subtitle: Hindi-English Bank/IBPS Style Connector Practice
metadata.recommendedUse: Mobile-first PWA flashcards, quizzes, daily revision, bookmarked mistakes
metadata.createdFor: Phrase connectors, tones, meanings, usage, examples, and practice questions

coreConcepts.title: What are Phrase Connectors?
coreConcepts.explanation_en: Phrase connectors are words or phrases that connect two ideas, clauses, or sentences logically. They show whether the relation is reason, result, contrast, condition, purpose, addition, time, example, or conclusion.
coreConcepts.explanation_hi: Phrase connectors ऐसे words/phrases होते हैं जो दो ideas, clauses या sentences को logically जोड़ते हैं। ये बताते हैं कि relation reason, result, contrast, condition, purpose, addition, time, example या conclusion है।

example.after: Although he studied hard, he failed the exam.
example.meaning_hi: हालाँकि उसने बहुत पढ़ाई की, फिर भी वह परीक्षा में fail हो गया।

coreConcepts.title: Connector vs Preposition Pattern
coreConcepts.explanation_en: Some connectors take a full clause after them, while some take only a noun phrase or V-ing.
coreConcepts.explanation_hi: कुछ connectors के बाद full clause आता है, और कुछ के बाद noun phrase या V-ing आता है।

rules.pattern: because / although / if / when + Subject + Verb
rules.example: Although he was tired, he worked.

rules.pattern: because of / due to / despite / in spite of + noun or V-ing

coreConcepts.title: Exam Solving Formula
coreConcepts.explanation_en: First identify the relation between the two ideas, then check the grammar structure required by the connector, and finally ensure the original meaning remains unchanged.
coreConcepts.explanation_hi: पहले दोनों ideas का relation पहचानो, फिर connector की grammar structure check करो, और अंत में देखो कि original meaning same रह रहा है या नहीं।
steps: Identify relation: reason, result, contrast, condition, purpose, addition, time, example, clarification, conclusion.
Check structure: Subject + Verb or noun/V-ing.
Check meaning: sentence का original meaning change नहीं होना चाहिए।

toneMap.hindiSignal: जब / पहले / बाद में / जैसे ही

commonRules.rule: Although / Though / Even though + Subject + Verb
commonRules.correct: Although he was tired, he worked.
commonRules.wrong: Although he was tired, but he worked.
commonRules.note_hi: Although और but को साथ में generally use नहीं करते।

commonRules.rule: Despite / In spite of + noun / V-ing
commonRules.wrong: Despite he was tired, he worked.
commonRules.note_hi: Despite के बाद full Subject + Verb clause नहीं आता।

commonRules.correct: He failed because he was careless.
commonRules.note_hi: Because के बाद full clause आता है।

commonRules.rule: Because of / Due to + noun / V-ing
commonRules.correct: He failed because of his carelessness.
commonRules.wrong: He failed because of he was careless.
commonRules.note_hi: Because of और due to के बाद noun phrase आता है।

commonRules.correct: Unless you study, you will fail.
commonRules.wrong: Unless you do not study, you will fail.
commonRules.note_hi: Unless already negative meaning देता है, इसलिए extra not नहीं लगाते।

commonRules.correct: He was tired, so he slept. / He slept early so that he could wake up early.
commonRules.wrong: He slept early so he could wake up early. Sometimes acceptable informally, but in exams purpose is better with so that.
commonRules.note_hi: Result के लिए so, purpose के लिए so that।

keywords.example: Although he was tired, he continued working.
Though the question was difficult, he solved it.
Even though she had no experience, she got selected.
Despite being tired, he worked.
In spite of being nervous, she performed well.
The plan was expensive. However, it was effective.
Ravi likes tea, whereas Mohan likes coffee.
While I was studying, my brother was watching TV.
He failed because he did not study.
The match was cancelled because of heavy rain.
The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
Since he was unwell, he stayed at home.
He missed the bus. Therefore, he reached late.
He practised daily. Thus, he improved his speed.
He was not eligible. Hence, his application was rejected.
The company reduced production. Consequently, many workers lost their jobs.
He was so weak that he could not walk.
If you work hard, you will succeed.
Unless you study, you will fail.
You may enter the hall provided that you carry your admit card.
He saved money so that he could buy a laptop.
She left early in order to catch the train.
The phone has a good camera. Moreover, it has a powerful battery.
The plan is simple. Furthermore, it is practical.
Some topics are important; for example, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
The exam has sectional timing; in other words, each section has a fixed time limit.
Work hard; otherwise, you may fail.

keywords.structure: not only X but also Y
keywords.example: She is not only intelligent but also hardworking.
As soon as he reached the station, the train left.
Wait here until I return.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using although: He was ill. He attended the exam.
practiceQuestions.answer: Although he was ill, he attended the exam.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Although shows contrast. Illness and attending the exam are opposite/unexpected ideas.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Although contrast दिखाता है। Ill होना और exam attend करना opposite/unexpected situation है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. Although he was poor, he was honest.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Although and but should not usually be used together in the same sentence.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Although + but साथ में generally गलत होता है।
options: A. Although he was poor, but he was honest.
B. Although he was poor, he was honest.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using though: The question was difficult. He solved it.
practiceQuestions.answer: Though the question was difficult, he solved it.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Though shows contrast between difficulty and successful solving.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Question difficult था, फिर भी उसने solve किया। यह contrast है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: He is young, ___ he is very mature.
practiceQuestions.answer: though
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Though shows contrast between being young and being mature.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Young होना और mature होना contrast create कर रहा है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using even though: She had no experience. She got selected.
practiceQuestions.answer: Even though she had no experience, she got selected.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Even though shows strong contrast.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Even though strong contrast दिखाता है। भले ही उसके पास experience नहीं था, फिर भी वह select हो गई.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: ___ it was raining heavily, the match continued.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. Even though
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Rain and the match continuing are opposite ideas, so a contrast connector is required.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Rain और match continue होना opposite direction में हैं, इसलिए contrast connector चाहिए.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using despite: He was tired. He continued working.
practiceQuestions.answer: Despite being tired, he continued working.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Despite takes a noun phrase or V-ing, not a full Subject + Verb clause.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Despite के बाद Subject + Verb नहीं आता; noun/V-ing आता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. Despite being ill, he came to class.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Despite should be followed by noun/V-ing, so 'being ill' is correct.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Despite + being ill correct है. 'Despite he was ill' wrong है.
options: A. Despite he was ill, he came to class.
B. Despite being ill, he came to class.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using in spite of: He had little money. He helped the poor.
practiceQuestions.answer: In spite of having little money, he helped the poor.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: In spite of is used like despite and is followed by noun/V-ing.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: In spite of भी despite जैसा है. इसके बाद noun या V-ing आता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Transform: Although she was nervous, she performed well.
practiceQuestions.answer: In spite of being nervous, she performed well.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Although + clause can be transformed into in spite of + V-ing/noun phrase.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Although + S + V को In spite of + V-ing में बदला गया.
practiceQuestions.pattern: Although clause -> In spite of + V-ing

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using however: The plan was expensive. It was effective.
practiceQuestions.answer: The plan was expensive. However, it was effective.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: However is a formal contrast connector used between two sentences or clauses.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: However formal contrast connector है. Plan महँगा था, हालाँकि effective था.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: He worked hard. ___, he could not pass.
practiceQuestions.answer: However
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Working hard and not passing create contrast.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Worked hard but failed = contrast.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using whereas: Ravi likes tea. Mohan likes coffee.
practiceQuestions.answer: Ravi likes tea, whereas Mohan likes coffee.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Whereas shows comparison contrast between two people or facts.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Whereas comparison contrast दिखाता है: Ravi tea पसंद करता है, जबकि Mohan coffee.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: The first method is fast, ___ the second method is more accurate.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. whereas
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The sentence compares two methods and shows contrast between speed and accuracy.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Fast vs accurate — comparison contrast है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using while as contrast: Some students prefer online classes. Others prefer offline classes.
practiceQuestions.answer: Some students prefer online classes, while others prefer offline classes.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Here while means whereas and shows contrast.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ while का meaning 'whereas / जबकि' है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using while as time: I was studying. My brother was watching TV.
practiceQuestions.answer: While I was studying, my brother was watching TV.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Here while shows that both actions happened at the same time.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ while time connector है: जब मैं पढ़ रहा था.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using because: He failed. He did not study.
practiceQuestions.answer: He failed because he did not study.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Because gives the reason and takes Subject + Verb after it.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Because reason बताता है और इसके बाद Subject + Verb आता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. He was late because he got stuck in traffic.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Because should be followed by a full clause, not just a noun.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Because के बाद full clause चाहिए: he got stuck.
options: A. He was late because traffic.
B. He was late because he got stuck in traffic.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using because of: The match was cancelled. It rained heavily.
practiceQuestions.answer: The match was cancelled because of heavy rain.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Because of is followed by a noun phrase; 'heavy rain' is a noun phrase.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Because of के बाद noun आता है: heavy rain.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. Because of his carelessness, he failed.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Because of should be followed by noun phrase; 'his carelessness' is a noun phrase.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Because of + noun. 'His carelessness' noun phrase है.
options: A. Because of he was careless, he failed.
B. Because of his carelessness, he failed.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using due to: The flight was delayed. There was bad weather.
practiceQuestions.answer: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Due to gives the reason and is followed by noun phrase.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Due to reason बताता है, और इसके बाद noun phrase आता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: The school was closed ___ heavy rain.
practiceQuestions.answer: due to
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Heavy rain is a noun phrase, so due to is correct.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Heavy rain noun phrase है, इसलिए due to correct है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Use since as reason: He was unwell. He stayed at home.
practiceQuestions.answer: Since he was unwell, he stayed at home.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Here since means because and gives a reason.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ since = because / चूँकि.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Use since as time: He has lived in Delhi. He came here in 2020.
practiceQuestions.answer: He has lived in Delhi since 2020.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Here since means from a point of time.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यहाँ since = तब से. Time point के लिए since use होता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using therefore: He missed the bus. He reached late.
practiceQuestions.answer: He missed the bus. Therefore, he reached late.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Therefore shows result. Missing the bus caused him to reach late.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Therefore result दिखाता है. Bus miss करना reason है, late reach करना result.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: The demand increased. ___, the prices rose.
practiceQuestions.answer: Therefore
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Price rise is the result of increased demand.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Demand increase होने का result price rise है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using thus: He practised daily. He improved his speed.
practiceQuestions.answer: He practised daily. Thus, he improved his speed.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Thus is a formal result connector.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Thus formal result connector है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: The evidence was weak. ___, the case was dismissed.
practiceQuestions.answer: A. Thus
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The case being dismissed is the result of weak evidence.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Weak evidence के कारण case dismiss हुआ. यह result है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using hence: He was not eligible. His application was rejected.
practiceQuestions.answer: He was not eligible. Hence, his application was rejected.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Hence is a formal result connector.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Hence formal result connector है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: The data was incomplete. ___, the report could not be finalized.
practiceQuestions.answer: Hence
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The report not being finalized is the result of incomplete data.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Incomplete data का result है report finalize न होना.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using consequently: The company reduced production. Many workers lost their jobs.
practiceQuestions.answer: The company reduced production. Consequently, many workers lost their jobs.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Consequently means as a result.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Consequently = as a result / परिणामस्वरूप.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: He ignored the warning. ___, he faced serious problems.
practiceQuestions.answer: A. Consequently
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Facing problems is the result of ignoring the warning.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Warning ignore करने का result problems हैं.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using if: You work hard. You will succeed.
practiceQuestions.answer: If you work hard, you will succeed.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: If introduces a condition.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: If condition बताता है: अगर मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: ___ you revise daily, you will remember the concepts.
practiceQuestions.answer: If
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Daily revision is the condition for remembering concepts.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Daily revision condition है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using unless: You do not study. You will fail.
practiceQuestions.answer: Unless you study, you will fail.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Unless means if not.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Unless = if not. जब तक तुम पढ़ाई नहीं करोगे, तुम fail होगे.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. Unless you work hard, you will fail.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Unless already carries negative meaning, so do not add extra not.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Unless already negative meaning देता है. इसके साथ extra not नहीं लगाना.
options: A. Unless you do not work hard, you will fail.
B. Unless you work hard, you will fail.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using provided that: You may enter the hall. You must carry your admit card.
practiceQuestions.answer: You may enter the hall provided that you carry your admit card.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Provided that is a formal condition connector.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Provided that formal condition connector है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: You can apply for the post ___ you meet the eligibility criteria.
practiceQuestions.answer: provided that
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Meeting eligibility is the condition for applying.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Eligibility condition है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using so that: He saved money. He wanted to buy a laptop.
practiceQuestions.answer: He saved money so that he could buy a laptop.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: So that shows purpose.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: So that purpose बताता है: उसने पैसे बचाए ताकि laptop खरीद सके.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: She spoke loudly ___ everyone could hear her.
practiceQuestions.answer: B. so that
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The purpose of speaking loudly was that everyone could hear her.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Speaking loudly का purpose है everyone could hear her.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using in order to: He joined coaching. He wanted to improve his preparation.
practiceQuestions.answer: He joined coaching in order to improve his preparation.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: In order to shows purpose and is followed by V1.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: In order to purpose बताता है. Structure: in order to + V1.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: She left early ___ catch the train.
practiceQuestions.answer: in order to
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Catching the train is the purpose of leaving early.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Catch the train purpose है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using moreover: The phone has a good camera. It also has a powerful battery.
practiceQuestions.answer: The phone has a good camera. Moreover, it has a powerful battery.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Moreover adds an extra positive point.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Moreover extra positive point add करता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: The course is affordable. ___, it provides quality content.
practiceQuestions.answer: Moreover
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Both points move in the same direction, so an addition connector is needed.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: दोनों points same direction में हैं. Addition connector चाहिए.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using furthermore: The plan is simple. It is also practical.
practiceQuestions.answer: The plan is simple. Furthermore, it is practical.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Furthermore is a formal addition connector.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Furthermore formal addition connector है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct connector: The policy will help farmers. ___, it will increase rural employment.
practiceQuestions.answer: A. Furthermore
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The second point adds another benefit to the first point.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Second point first point में extra benefit add कर रहा है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: Many banking exams test reasoning skills; ___, IBPS SO and SBI SO include reasoning sections.
practiceQuestions.answer: for example
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: IBPS SO and SBI SO are examples.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: IBPS SO और SBI SO examples हैं.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Use for example: Some topics are important in English. RC and Cloze Test are two of them.
practiceQuestions.answer: Some topics are important in English; for example, RC and Cloze Test are frequently asked.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: For example introduces examples to clarify a general idea.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: For example example introduce करता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using in other words: The exam has sectional timing. Each section has a fixed time limit.
practiceQuestions.answer: The exam has sectional timing; in other words, each section has a fixed time limit.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: In other words gives clarification or restatement.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: In other words clarification देता है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: He is an introvert; ___, he prefers limited social interaction.
practiceQuestions.answer: in other words
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The second part explains the first part.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Second sentence first sentence को explain कर रहा है.
practiceQuestions.pattern: in other words = दूसरे शब्दों में

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using otherwise: Work hard. You may fail.
practiceQuestions.answer: Work hard; otherwise, you may fail.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Otherwise shows a warning or negative result if the advice is not followed.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Otherwise warning/result दिखाता है: मेहनत करो, नहीं तो fail हो सकते हो.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: Submit the form today; ___, you may miss the deadline.
practiceQuestions.answer: otherwise
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: If the form is not submitted, the negative result is missing the deadline.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Form submit न करने का negative result deadline miss होना है.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using not only...but also: She is intelligent. She is hardworking.
practiceQuestions.answer: She is not only intelligent but also hardworking.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: This connector shows addition with emphasis.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यह connector emphasis के साथ addition दिखाता है.
practiceQuestions.pattern: not only X but also Y

practiceQuestions.prompt: Correct the sentence if needed: He not only sings but also dances.
practiceQuestions.answer: He not only sings but also dances.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The sentence is already correct because the parallel structure is maintained: sings + dances.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: यह sentence already correct है क्योंकि parallel structure maintain है: sings + dances.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using as soon as: He reached the station. The train left.
practiceQuestions.answer: As soon as he reached the station, the train left.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: As soon as shows immediate time relation.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: As soon as immediate time relation दिखाता है: जैसे ही वह station पहुँचा, train चली गई.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: ___ the exam started, the server crashed.
practiceQuestions.answer: As soon as
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The server crashed immediately after the exam started.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Exam start होते ही server crash हुआ.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using until: Wait here. I return.
practiceQuestions.answer: Wait here until I return.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: Until shows continuation up to a point of time.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Until continuation दिखाता है: जब तक मैं वापस न आऊँ, यहीं रुको.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct sentence.
practiceQuestions.answer: A. I will wait until you come.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: After time connectors like until, when, and as soon as, simple present is used for future meaning in exam grammar.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Time connectors जैसे until, when, as soon as के बाद future meaning में भी simple present आता है.
options: A. I will wait until you come.
B. I will wait until you will come.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Join using so...that: He was very weak. He could not walk.
practiceQuestions.answer: He was so weak that he could not walk.
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: So...that shows degree and result.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: So...that degree + result दिखाता है: वह इतना कमजोर था कि चल नहीं सकता था.

practiceQuestions.prompt: Fill in the blank: The question was ___ difficult ___ no one could solve it.
practiceQuestions.answer: so...that
practiceQuestions.explanation_en: The difficulty caused the result that no one solved it.
practiceQuestions.explanation_hi: Difficulty का result है कि no one solved it.
